{{Quote|Mister Morrow, Mister Tom Morrow... please check with the Star Tours agent at gate number four.|Star Tours public address announcer|<ref name="Star Tours" />}}
Mister '''Tom Morrow''' was a customer of the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency. A public address announcer asked him to see a Star Tours agent at gate number four, shortly before a Star Tours vessel departed and became involved in a [[Battle of Death Star III|battle]].<ref name="Star Tours" />

==Behind the scenes==
This character was only mentioned briefly in the waiting area of the [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] ride in various [[Wikipedia:Walt Disney Parks and Resorts|Disney theme parks]].<ref name="Star Tours" /> A character named Tom Morrow first appeared in a now-defunct Disney attraction called ''Flight to the Moon'' before being renamed when the show became [[Wikipedia:Mission to Mars (attraction)|''Mission to Mars'']]. Years later, new robotic versions of Tom appeared at the ''Innoventions'' attraction at [[Disneyland]] and [[Wikipedia:Epcot|Epcot]].<ref name="D23">{{D23|url=a-to-z/tom-morrow|text=Disney A to Z: Tom Morrow}}</ref> The name can also be heard in a similar announcement on the [[Wikipedia:Walt Disney World|Walt Disney World]] ride [[Wikipedia:Tomorrowland Transit Authority|''Tomorrowland Transit Authority'']], and a sign once mentioned him lecturing on the subject, "Mission to Mars: History or Hoax?"<ref name="Disney Wiki">{{WebCite|url=https://disney.fandom.com/wiki/Tom_Morrow|text=Tom Morrow|work=The Disney Wiki|archivedate=20211015113838}}</ref> In the updated version of the ride, ''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]'', the announcer paged [[Mot Worrom]] instead.<ref name="ST2">''[[Star Tours: The Adventures Continue]]''</ref>
